mapper.select: SELECT id, request_no, student_id, student_name, contact_phone, dorm_room_id, dorm_area_snapshot, building_no_snapshot, room_no_snapshot, fault_category, description, status, reviewer_id, worker_id, urge_count, submitted_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM repair_requests WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO repair_requests ( request_no, student_id, student_name, contact_phone, dorm_room_id, dorm_area_snapshot, building_no_snapshot, room_no_snapshot, fault_category, description, status, reviewer_id, worker_id, urge_count, submitted_at, completed_at ) VALUES ( #{requestNo}, #{studentId}, #{studentName}, #{contactPhone}, #{dormRoomId}, #{dormAreaSnapshot}, #{buildingNoSnapshot}, #{roomNoSnapshot}, #{faultCategory}, #{description}, #{status}, #{reviewerId}, #{workerId}, #{urgeCount}, #{submittedAt}, #{completedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, request_no, student_name, CASE WHEN dorm_area_snapshot IS NULL OR dorm_area_snapshot = '' THEN CONCAT(building_no_snapshot, '-', room_no_snapshot) ELSE CONCAT(dorm_area_snapshot, ' ', building_no_snapshot, '-', room_no_snapshot) END AS location_text, fault_category, status, submitted_at FROM repair_requests ORDER BY submitted_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, request_no, student_name, CASE WHEN dorm_area_snapshot IS NULL OR dorm_area_snapshot = '' THEN CONCAT(building_no_snapshot, '-', room_no_snapshot) ELSE CONCAT(dorm_area_snapshot, ' ', building_no_snapshot, '-', room_no_snapshot) END AS location_text, fault_category, status, submitted_at FROM repair_requests WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY submitted_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, student_id, request_no, student_name, contact_phone, dorm_area_snapshot, building_no_snapshot, room_no_snapshot, fault_category, description, status, urge_count, worker_id, submitted_at, completed_at FROM repair_requests WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND id = #{requestId}

SELECT id, request_no, student_name, CASE WHEN dorm_area_snapshot IS NULL OR dorm_area_snapshot = '' THEN CONCAT(building_no_snapshot, '-', room_no_snapshot) ELSE CONCAT(dorm_area_snapshot, ' ', building_no_snapshot, '-', room_no_snapshot) END AS location_text, fault_category, status, submitted_at FROM repair_requests WHERE status = 'SUBMITTED' ORDER BY submitted_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
